title: aspilia rudis subsp. rudis
intro: Aspilia rudis subsp. rudis, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is commonly known as the rough aspilia or wild sage. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aspilia rudis subsp. rudis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Aspilia rudis subsp. rudis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
